hooks.command:
$date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $time = Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm'; $dir = 'context/History_log'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null }; $file = "$dir/$date.md"; $changed = git diff --name-only HEAD 2>$null; if (!$changed) { $changed = (git status --short 2>$null) -join "`n" }; if (!$changed) { exit 0 }; $changedStr = ($changed -join "`n").Trim(); if (!$changedStr) { exit 0 }; if (Test-Path $file) { $existing = Get-Content -Path $file -Raw -Encoding utf8; if ($existing -match [regex]::Escape($changedStr)) { exit 0 } } else { Set-Content -Path $file -Value "# History Log — $date`n" -Encoding utf8 }; $entry = "`n---`n`n## $time`n`n### Files changed`n``````
$changedStr`n``````
"; Add-Content -Path $file -Value $entry -Encoding utf8
